abilities: What's ten feet tall and made of ice?
chatter: Come on, Snowball! They need our help!
Everyone, stick together! We can do this!
Scanning... yes, this is the place!
Science holds the key to understanding.
The planet is not going to save itself!
Hey! Be careful, Juno. Your mother will be furious if I let anything happen to you! (with Juno on the team)
Let's show them what a team of scientists can do! (with multiple scientist heroes on the team)
Oh! I've got butterflies!
It's time! Are we ready?
Let's do this!
Okay, deep breaths. We can do this!
Okay, everyone, let's do it again!
This is going really well!
We're almost there, just one more victory!
I still believe we can succeed.
*laugh* One win and we're back in this!
We can still do this. Let's give it our best!
Let's go for the win!
This is it! Everyone, work together!
Are you okay, Snowball?
Don't give up. We can do this!
Just part of the scientific method.
Let's do this, Snowball.
The important thing is to keep learning.
The world's not going to save itself!
*sigh* There's a lesson in every mistake!
Time for another experiment!
We have to try again.
Whoa! That was going great! ...Until the end. (eliminated with Kill Streak)
I think I'm alone out here...
Where is everyone?
Why isn't my team back yet?
Healed up!
Much better!
I'm completely warmed up!
I'm on fire! ...Well, you know what I mean.
Watch out! I'm steaming hot!
Wow, I'm actually on fire!
A little boost.
Let's try something new.
Never stop learning.
That'll help!
I'll put this to good use!
Very cool.
*giggles* That tickles!
Thank you!
Wow, that's nice!
You're a life saver!
*relieved sigh* Thank you, Juno! (healed by Juno )
This is awesome!
Whoa! Look out! Here I come!
Wow!
*giggle* You'd better watch your step.
*growls*
Get ready! They're coming back!
Oh no, the enemy's getting back up!
Uh, they're not supposed to be... getting up, right?
Uh oh, you made him angry! (friendly Winston using Primal Rage)
call-outs: You should get out of the way!
Come on, everyone, just a little bit longer!
Everyone, stick together! We can do this!
Just hold on a bit longer, everyone!
We can do this if we put our heads together!
This is our last chance to attack!
We can't lose! Come on, everyone!
We're running out of time. Let's hurry!
eliminations: We could have just talked it out.
(Chinese: You don't have to be so hard on yourself.) (eliminating Anran )
You can't thaw me out! (eliminating Anran or Illari )
That's what you get for being so rude. (eliminating Ashe , Junker Queen , Junkrat , Ramattra , Roadhog or any Talon members)
Sorry, but my walls are cooler! (eliminating Hazard )
*gasps* What would your mother say? (eliminating Juno )
Frost is bad for plants, you know! (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Oh, no. I hope I'm not mad at me. (eliminating another Mei )
Oh! Did you get cold feet? (eliminating Sigma )
Did you see that shot, everyone? (Icicle headshot)
Can't believe I hit you up there! (eliminating airborne enemy)
Whoa... It's like you're frozen in time! (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Anyone want a popsicle? (eliminating frozen enemy)
Dress warmer next time! (eliminating frozen enemy)
You make a big icicle! (eliminating frozen enemy with Icicle)
Aren't you used to the cold? (eliminating frozen Sojourn or Zarya )
Ha! Why do you look so blue? (eliminating frozen Widowmaker )
Please relax, Winston. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Considering the probability, that was a miracle!
The enemy team's down, now's our chance!
We got all of them! Great work, everyone!
Oh. Try to land on something soft!
Wow, Hana! That was so cool! (to D.Va )
Ah, Jiayi would be so proud! (to Juno )
Great job, Lúcio! You're good at this! (to Lúcio )
Winston, you're so awesome! Just like Sun Wukong! (to Winston )
You're so strong, Zarya! Wow! (to Zarya )
interactions: Baptiste : Knock knock! Mei : Who's there? Baptiste : Atch! Mei : Atch who? Baptiste : Sounds like you have a cold. Let me heal you up!

Mei : Are you going to the gym when we get back? Brigitte : No way! Today's my cheat day. I'm going to eat a whole apple pie and sleep. Mei : Cheat day? Is that allowed? Brigitte : Of course! My work out, my rules.
Cassidy : Hey, Dr. Zhou. Is it gonna rain? Mei : Looks like a 30% chance of precipitation. Cassidy : So... maybe. * sigh * The marvels of modern science.
Mei : *sigh* I really need some new clothes. D.Va : Let me take you shopping in Seoul. I'll find you all the cutest stuff! Mei : Wait, really? I mean... wow! That sounds fun!
D.Va : Someday, I'm going to finally travel the world! Got any tips? Mei : Um... Travel light. But you never know when you need more socks. And underwear. And shirts. Oh! And pants.

Mei : Doomfist, how can you live with yourself? So many people have died because of you! Doomfist : Yes, but many more have lived. Mei : That makes no sense! Do you hear yourself? Ugh, you're the worst.

Echo : Could you describe the taste of chicken rice? Mei : Oh, it's very tender and tasty but... subtle? Echo : Thank you. It was Dr. Liao 's favorite dish. Mei : I'll have some and explain it better next time!
Mei : Genji? Were you the last one in the kitchen? Genji : Yes. I was preparing my meals for the week. Mei : Oh! Well... could you use a knife next time? The sword is a bit messy.
Mei : I saw you carving wooden charms earlier! Can I see? Hanzo : I... have not honed my skills enough. Mei : Oh... Ice might be easier. Want me to show you? Hanzo : Uh... perhaps.
Hazard : Do I spook ye? Look like you're seeing spirits. Mei : Wha–no! You're just, um... unique! Hazard : *soft chuckle* Nae bother, lassie. I'm used to it.

Illari : Why do you apologize so much? Mei : I guess there's a lot I feel sorry about. Don't you? Illari : It doesn't matter. Anyone I would apologize to... is gone. Mei : Ah... I know how that feels.
Juno : Auntie Mei, what did Mother do for fun? Mei : Lots of things! Figure skating, karaoke... and, of course, partying! Juno : Then I must learn these skills too.

Mei : You look pale, Juno. Did you skip dinner again? Juno : Yes... I spent so long deciding what to try, that I stopped feeling hungry. Mei : That is not a good excuse. *sighs* I'm cooking for you later.

Juno : Auntie, can you think of any reasons the storms back home have become so violent? Mei : It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up until I figure it out. It's hard to say without more data... but I won't give up. My friend needs me.
Mei : *sigh* I concerned about Jiayi . I hope she's okay. Juno : Oh, do not worry! Even through troubling times, Mother always find a reason to smile. Mei : I'm glad to hear she hasn't changed.
Juno : Have we received any information from Dr. Shing? Mei : Not yet. I know it's hard to wait but... let's have hope. Juno : *sigh* I will try. I am eager to hear from her again.
Juno : What is wrong, auntie Mei? You look sad. Mei : I'm okay. I'm just... remembering the past. Juno : Did something happened here? Mei : I'll tell about it another time.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Mei : Ooh! I like penguins! Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : They aren't ready for this! Mei : Um, can you use your inside voice? Mauga : This is my inside voice!

Moira: I've read your report on cryogenically preserving severed appendages. I would be happy to assist in your research. Mei: No thank you. I don't think our methodologies are very aligned. Moira : Of course. I've heard you prefer working alone. Come now, doctor. I was only hoping to lend a hand.

Mei : Have you gotten bigger , Orisa? Orisa : My dimensions have not changed. Does the javelin make me look taller? Mei : A little. But I still think you're just as cute as before! Orisa : Oh! That is... thank you!

Mei : How did you become so miserable? Reaper : What do you think? Overwatch . Mei : But... I love being in Overwatch. It feels good to make a difference. Reaper : All that "difference" comes back to bite you. You'll see.
Mei : Oh, I feel like I'm forgetting something. Reinhardt : All you need for battle is your heart and your head. Mei : What about a hammer and shield? Reinhardt : *laughs* Bonuses!
Mei : Please be careful where you're swinging, Reinhardt... almost hit Snowball last time! Reinhardt : *embarrassed chuckle* My apologies, Snowball. Sometimes my hammer is quicker than my head!

Sigma : If you know what you're looking for, inquiry is unnecessary. But if you don't know, how do you inquire? Mei : Well, maybe you know a little bit, and you keep asking questions until you figure it out!

Sojourn : I saw you training yesterday. Can I give you a tip? Mei : Um... sure! Sojourn : Widen your stance. Might feel strange at first, but it keeps you balanced. Mei : Oh... thank you, Sojourn! I'll try that next time!
Soldier: 76 : Dr. Zhou. Did Captain Opara make it back as well? Mei : I'm afraid not. Soldier: 76 : * sigh * He was a good man. Mei : He thought the same about you.
Soldier: 76 : I was just in the kitchen. Anyone have something they wanna confess? Mei : I saw someone steal your leftovers, but I'm afraid to say who. Soldier: 76 : *tired sigh*
Symmetra : I can't imagine you're here to do research. Why are you fighting? Mei : I'm here to make a difference in the world. Just like you, right?
Mei : Do you ever make snowflakes with your light? Symmetra : Regularly. Their repetitive patterns bring peace to my mind. Mei : Great! We can build a snow fortress!
Torbjörn : Dr. Zhou! You've made quite the name for yourself. Mei : Oh, thank you! I think there's always more to learn. Torbjörn : Quit being so humble. Nothing wrong with being proud of your work!

Venture : Whoa! Your drone is so cool! Mei : Thank you! His name is Snowball . Say hi, Snowball! Venture : Hey, little guy! Aw, I wish my holoreplicator had a face. Mei : *giggle* You should try sticking some googly eyes on it!
Widowmaker : You could not save your friends... what make you think you can save the world? Mei : I trust my team like I trust my family. I hope some day... you can do the same.
Winston : Can you look at my report later? Something seems off. Mei : Winston, you know what I'm going to say to that. Winston : *laughs* Of course. I know I "can always count on Mei"!
Winston : I can't wait for our next hot pot, Mei! Mei : Next time, I'll get more peanut sauce for you! Winston : Maybe without all the... spice? Mei : Winston! That's the best part!
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Mei : Na! Winston : *chuckles*
Wrecking Ball

Wuyang : Too bad nobody here fights with steam. We'd have a whole cycle water locked down! Mei : *sigh* A little heat could get us there. Ooh! What about your sister? Wuyang : *sigh* She does get my blood boiling. So, I guess she fits the bill.
map-specific: Remember, Mei. They wouldn't want you to be sad.
I heard someone climbed Ulvetanna without ropes? Torres would have been so jealous!
Sorry, sorry, I'm so sorry! Ooh, ah, come on, Snowball, dance with me!
Do do do do do do do, I love this song!
Weather report: a storm is rising!
Our world is worth fighting for.
My friend Jiayi works here. She and I had a lot of fun in grad school. Maybe too much. *giggle*
Who would have thought that Jiayi would end up on Mars?
It's so hot. Ah, I forgot my summer clothes again!
Weather report: killer robots... Wait, that can't be right.
Gibraltar is bigger than I remember. Or maybe it's just that I've never seen it so empty...
